base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of large_enemies_atlas — a character (enemy_group) from 1987 final fantasy. Large-enemy roster — T-rex/mindflayer/naga/hydra/giants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
